review_snippets.text: I was so impressed with the product and services I received from Local Fence in Methuen. Dan made the whole process very easy. review_snippets.name: Laura C.
review_snippets.text: This is the second time I've used local fence. I knew they would be the ones to call when extending and updating my fence at my new home. Dan is so easy to work with. He and his crew did such a great job and got the install done in less time than I expected with all the quality!

review_snippets.name: Melissa G.
review_snippets.text:
We had an exceptional experience with Local Fence! From the very first consultation to the final installation, Dan was professional, responsive, and truly dedicated to delivering high-quality work.

The crew arrived on time, worked efficiently, and maintained a clean and safe wor

review_snippets.name: Lydia C.
review_snippets.text: Dan the owner of Local Fence, Methuen, answers questions immediately, does great work and was willing to change a decision I made a third of the way through the project.  The cedar board fence looks great and is very strongly built.  I highly recommend this company!
